design_philosophy.core_loop: Navigate town and dungeons, engage in grid-based turn combat using summoned Personas, manage Persona evolution through battle usage and demon negotiation, acquire tarot cards to create new Personas
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Supernatural mystery threatening the world; tension between student life and dangerous supernatural encounters; managing which Personas to develop vs. deploy in combat
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: High school student discovering hidden supernatural powers within (Personas as inner selves), gaining control over mythological entities, solving supernatural mystery with peer group
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Grounded the JRPG in contemporary high school setting and Jungian psychology; Persona system makes individual character growth customizable and independent of party composition; demon negotiation adds social/emotional layer to combat rather than pure stats; lunar phase system ties world state to player progression

difficulty.checkpointing: Player saves at predetermined locations only; no mid-dungeon checkpoints
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: High agency through Persona composition and customization; combat rewards tactical positioning on grid and party formation management; demon negotiation provides risk/reward choice (talk for items/cards vs. attack safely)

progression.upgrade_system: Personas level independently of characters through combat usage; new Personas created via tarot cards obtained from demons or purchased; individual Personas learn up to 8 skills through extended use; characters equip weapons/firearms alongside Personas
progression.unlock_mechanism: Progression gated by story events and supernatural incidents; demon negotiation unlocks access to spell cards and items; Persona creation unlocked through tarot card acquisition
replayability_hooks: Multiple Persona combinations per character create different playstyles
Demon negotiation outcomes vary by personality type (anger, fear, joy, interest)
Grid-based positioning strategies create tactical variety in battles
Lunar phase system affects demon activity patterns and moods

world_building_techniques: Character-driven narrative centered on high school student group dynamics
Jungian psychology concepts (Personas as multiple inner selves) embedded in core mechanics
Supernatural incidents as narrative drivers for gameplay progression
Philemon character guides party and represents humanity's subconscious
Town navigation creates sense of grounded, contemporary setting contrasting with supernatural elements

faction_indicators: High school student group united by supernatural power discovery
Guidance by Philemon (benevolent subconscious force) vs. opposing supernatural threats
danger_signals: Series of supernatural incidents threatening the world
Multiple forces confronting the group throughout narrative
environmental_storytelling: Hometown navigation provides grounded setting and character location context
Dungeon environments as manifestations of supernatural threats
Lunar phase display (top-right corner) shows time passage and influences world state
